title: Dynamic Glazing Application Feasibility
summary: Dynamic glazing is most feasible on large glazing facades not facing north, and works well on east/west orientations.

structured_payload.application_constraint: Dynamic glazing is usually the most feasible on large glazing facades not do not face north. It works well on east and west orientations since these are difficult to horizontally shade.

evidence_quote: Dynamic glazing is usually the most feasible on large glazing facades not do not face north. It works well on east and west orientations since these are difficult to horizontally shade.

title: Dynamic Glazing Tint Levels
summary: Dynamic glass can transform into four darkness levels corresponding to specific visible light transmittance values.
evidence_quote: Typically, the tint corresponds to 4%, 20%, 40%, and 60% visible light transmittance Tvis depending on manufacturers.

title: Dynamic Glazing Control Method
summary: Dynamic glazing is controlled by low voltage current, either manually or via an automatic building management system.

structured_payload.control_method: The dynamic glazing is usually controlled by a low voltage current and can be controlled either manually through a switch or linked into an automatic building management system (BMS).

evidence_quote: The dynamic glazing is usually controlled by a low voltage current and can be controlled either manually through a switch or linked into an automatic building management system (BMS).

title: Desiccant Dehumidification Application Threshold
summary: Applications requiring a dew point at or below 40°F (4.3°C) may be candidates for active desiccant dehumidification.

structured_payload.application_threshold: Applications that require a dew point at or below 40°F (4.3°C) may be candidates for active desiccant dehumidification.

evidence_quote: In general, applications that require a dew point at or below 40°F (4.3°C) may be candidates for active desiccant dehumidification.

title: Desiccant Dehumidifier Process Air Temperature Rise
summary: Process air outlet temperature rises roughly in proportion to the amount of moisture removed.

structured_payload.performance_characteristic: The outlet temperature rises roughly in proportion to the amount of moisture that is removed.

evidence_quote: The outlet temperature rises roughly in proportion to the amount of moisture that is removed.

title: Rotary Desiccant Dehumidifier Operation
summary: Humid air is dehumidified in one part of the desiccant bed while another part is dried for reuse by reactivation air.

structured_payload.operational_sequence: Humid air, generally referred to as process air, is dehumidified in one part of the desiccant bed while a different part of the bed is dried for reuse by a second airstream known as reactivation air.

evidence_quote: Humid air, generally referred to as process air, is dehumidified in one part of the desiccant bed while a different part of the bed is dried for reuse by a second airstream known as reactivation air.

title: Solar Thermal Application Temperature Ranges
summary: Solar thermal applications range from low-temperature (pool heating/DHW) to medium/high-temperature (space heating, absorption cooling, steam production).

structured_payload.parameter_value: Low-temperature (swimming pool heating or domestic hot water) up to medium- or high-temperature applications (space heating, absorption cooling or steam production for electrical generation).

evidence_quote: Solar energy thermal applications range from low-temperature applications (swimming pool heating or domestic hot water) up to medium- or high-temperature applications (space heating, absorption cooling or steam production for electrical generation).

title: Solar Combi System Design Requirement
summary: Solar combi systems require a larger collector area than a DHW system to meet higher loads.

structured_payload.design_guidance: Combi systems require a larger collector area than a DHW system to meet the higher loads.

evidence_quote: Combi systems require a larger collector area than a DHW system to meet the higher loads.
